issues.description: Categorical feature with excessive cardinality (5634 unique values).
Multicollinearity detected via Variance Inflation Factor (VIF: 9.7).
Multicollinearity detected via Variance Inflation Factor (VIF: 5.9).

recommendations.title: High Cardinality
recommendations.description: Categorical feature with excessive cardinality (5634 unique values).
recommendations.rationale: Data quality anomaly detected requiring engineering investigation.
actions: Conduct a manual review of this feature.

recommendations.title: Reduce Multicollinearity (High VIF)
recommendations.description: Multicollinearity detected via Variance Inflation Factor (VIF: 9.7).
recommendations.rationale: High Variance Inflation Factor (VIF) destabilizes the model, inflates variance, and makes interpretability impossible.
recommendations.impact: Stabilizes coefficients and feature importance attributions.
actions: Drop the feature with the higher VIF score.
Use PCA to compress the correlated feature space.
